title: clerodendrum tomentellum
intro: Clerodendrum tomentellum, also known as the hairy gloria, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum tomentellum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Clerodendrum tomentellum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds and their utilization in traditional remedies.
